name: Pure GoldenShift DSV (no NMF, 1/freq weighting)
author: Ashley Klimpel
notes: Results to be filled after leaderboard runs. submission.json is auto-updated by train_gpt.py at the end of each run. Pure DSV-only architecture: removes all NMF phases, removes bilateral build, adds 1/freq weighting. sem_fwd only at n_words=1024 = 8 MB (8 MB freed for n_words doubling to 2048 in Option A').
